data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of transferring numbers between queues, but the evidence provided does not include any successful API reads or state checks that confirm this capability. The only relevant mention in the use case is the need for this functionality, but no successful validation or evidence of its implementation is present. Therefore, this step clearly identifies a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of transferring numbers between queues.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
